text: §Ø_∆.µΩ在核心区的地面上留下了最后的笔记。
column4: #texten:§Ø_∆.µΩ left the final note on the floor of the core area.

text: 黑暗中，_99[k]r拼命向最深处跑去。
tags: #texten:In the darkness, _99[k]r sprinted toward the deepest point.

text: 核心区域还残留着最后一点微弱的光。
tags: #texten:A faint trace of light still lingered in the core area.

text: 我找到你了。我终于找到你了。
column6: #texten:I found you. I finally found you.

text: 你怎么来了……我不是说了不用找我吗。
column6: #texten:Why did you come... I said don't come looking for me.

text: 你觉得我看到那句话会听话吗。
column6: #texten:Did you really think I'd listen to that?
#texten:...Fair enough. You've always been like that.
